narrative:
Chester Township has 2,015 registered voters, with 53.2% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 37.1% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 9.7%, a pronounced Republican lean of 27.4 percentage points.
